title: Minecraft Unshackled
description: For those who want to go beyond vanilla.
body:
This Modpack is designed to give as many features as possible. This means you may not like some of the mods, so feel free to disable them.
# Features
Adds Many Features, such as:
- Incredible World Generation and structures using Dungeons and Taverns, Tectonic, Terralith, and more!
- Stunning Visuals with Continuity, Faithful, and more!
- Incredible QOL with AppleSkin, JEI, Jade, and So many more!
## Instructions
To get the most out of this pack:
- Enable All Resource Packs (Except Programmer Art)
- On first Bootup, Disable the Experimental Features Warning
- When creating a new world, enable both BetterEnd Datapacks
- If experiencing lag, disable Distant Horizons(Mod) and Vsync(Setting)
